name: Clear Creek Recreation District
description: Come play pickleball at Clear Creek Recreation District in Clearmont, WY! There is 1 indoor acrylic court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Scotty’s Skate Castle Winter
description: Scotty’s Skate Castle Winter is a place to play pickleball in Sheridan, WY. There are 4 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Sheridan County YMCA
description: Sheridan County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sheridan, WY. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Thorne Rider Park - Sheridan Rec District
description: Come play pickleball at Thorne Rider Park - Sheridan Rec District in Sheridan, WY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Tongue River Valley Community Center
description:
Wheelchair accessibility for indoor courts.

Outdoor courts (two) are not wheelchair accessible.
Outdoor courts have permanent nets (usually late April through mid November).
There are no lights at the Outdoor courts.   

Outdoor courts are located in the city park.

name: Woodland Park-sheridan Rec. District
description: Woodland Park-sheridan Rec. District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sheridan, WY. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Zero-Zero-Two Pickleball LLC
description: Come play pickleball at Zero-Zero-Two Pickleball LLC in Sheridan, WY! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Members only — $10 per Player per Hour
